title: wedelia vexata
intro: Wedelia vexata, also known as the wedelia plant or yellow flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of wedelia vexata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antacid and anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of wedelia vexata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
